name: POC - OID Agile Process - Prod - Feature Epic
description: This Agile process is based on the OID Agile Process - Prod, OID's standard Azure DevOps baseline. It is specifically created to conduct a POC for adjusting ADO to adjust ADO's default Epic/Feature/User Story work item hierarchy to align with a Feature/Epic/User Story hierarchy while maintain out-of-the box ADO functionality.
